---
title: "Python Tutorial Series: lambda, filter, map, and reduce"
lang: en
date: 2026-05-10
author: Anthony
categories: [Python, Programming Languages]
description: "Master lambda, filter, map, and reduce to write less loop code and cleaner Python data pipelines."
image: ../../cover/Python_logo.png
glossary:
  path: ../../../../_glossary/python.yml
  popup: hover
alternate-lang: "/articles/posts/python/lambda-filter-map-reduce/lambda-filter-map-reduce.html"
---
